metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Clientes'[Rango_Edad],
			"SumFrutas", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Frutas])),
			"SumCárnicos", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Cárnicos])),
			"SumPescado", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Pescado])),
			"SumPostres", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Postres])),
			"SumVinos", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Vinos])),
			"SumPremium", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Premium]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, 'Clientes'[Rango_Edad], 0)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Clientes'[Rango_Edad] DESC

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('Clientes'[Education], "Total_Consumo", 'Medidas'[Total Consumo])

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, [Total_Consumo], 0, 'Clientes'[Education], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[Total_Consumo] DESC, 'Clientes'[Education]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Clientes'[Total Hijos],
			"SumPremium", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Premium])),
			"SumFrutas", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Frutas])),
			"SumPescado", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Pescado])),
			"SumCárnicos", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Cárnicos])),
			"SumPostres", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Postres])),
			"SumVinos", CALCULATE(SUM('Clientes'[Vinos]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, 'Clientes'[Total Hijos], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Clientes'[Total Hijos]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)],
			"M0", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Frutas]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Frutas]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			),
			"M1", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Pescado]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Pescado]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			),
			"M2", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Cárnicos]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Cárnicos]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			),
			"M3", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Postres]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Postres]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			),
			"M4", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Vinos]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Vinos]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			),
			"M5", CALCULATE(
				DIVIDE(SUM('Clientes'[Premium]), CALCULATE(
					SUM('Clientes'[Premium]),
					ALLSELECTED('Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)])
				))
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, 'Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)], 0)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Clientes'[Monto Total (ubicaciones)] DESC

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZE('Clientes', 'Clientes'[Income], 'Clientes'[Monto Total])

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0BodyOverlappingPointsSample = 
		SAMPLECARTESIANPOINTSBYCOVER(3500, __DS0Core, 'Clientes'[Income], 'Clientes'[Monto Total])

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"DS0IntersectionCount", __DS0IntersectionCount
)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyOverlappingPointsSample

ORDER BY
	'Clientes'[Income], 'Clientes'[Monto Total]
